goal: Generate and refine anime RPG humanoid source models for web GLB or VRM runtime use.

tools.name: CharacterGen
strengths: closer to anime humanoid use cases than generic object reconstruction
risks: research pipeline output still needs topology cleanup
game-ready rig, expressions, and secondary motion are not guaranteed
tools.projectUse: Create the first Lyra 3D candidate from the portrait, then refine in Blender.

tools.name: Hunyuan3D
tools.role: image-to-3D mesh and texture candidate generation
strengths: useful for fast shape and texture exploration
risks: not specialized for animation-ready anime characters
face likeness and hair structure must be repaired manually
tools.projectUse: Generate alternate Lyra and player candidates for silhouette and color exploration.

tools.name: ComfyUI-3D-Pack
tools.role: workflow harness for comparing 3D generation backends
expectedOutput: multiple candidate meshes from different backends
strengths: can route the same portrait through several AI 3D methods
tools.projectUse: Run a bake-off between CharacterGen, Hunyuan3D, TRELLIS, TripoSR, and other generators.

tools.name: TRELLIS
tools.projectUse: Use as a fallback candidate generator when character-specific methods fail.

tools.name: TripoSR
strengths: useful as a CPU-tolerant baseline for silhouette experiments
risks: single-view reconstruction can flatten anime hair and clothing
does not produce game-ready topology, rig, expressions, or secondary motion
tools.projectUse: Use for fast local or remote silhouette probes when no GPU-backed CharacterGen/Hunyuan3D environment is available.

tools.name: UniRig
tools.role: automatic rigging and skinning candidate pass
strengths: targets automatic skeleton and skinning for generated characters
fits the pipeline stage between mesh generation and Blender cleanup
risks: auto-rig output still needs deformation review in walk and talk clips
VRM humanoid metadata, facial morphs, and spring bones still need Blender authoring
tools.projectUse: Use after a generated Lyra or player mesh has acceptable silhouette but lacks a usable skeleton.

tools.name: VRM Addon for Blender
tools.role: VRM import and export from Blender
expectedOutput: VRM avatar with humanoid metadata, expressions, and spring bones
tools.projectUse: Use when Lyra needs VRM expressions, lookAt, MToon, hair, skirt, and ribbon spring bones.

decision.finalAssetPath: Blender source model with manual cleanup, rigging, morphs, and GLB or VRM export
